Issue: does not specify the process for designating a Master user
Correction: The system shall provide an interface for the initial setup where the first user can be designated as the Master user.

Issue: does not specify the development process to be used
Correction: The development team shall use the Agile development process specified by Digital HomeOwner Inc.

Issue: does not specify the type of home computer required for the DH home web server
Correction: The DH home web server shall be hosted on a home computer running at least Windows 10, macOS 10.15, or a Linux distribution with kernel version 5.4 or higher.

Issue: does not specify the supported web browsers for accessing the system
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall support the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge browsers.

Issue: does not specify the default temperature setting
Correction: The default temperature setting for the thermostat shall be 72°F.

Issue: does not specify the default humidity setting
Correction: The default humidity setting for the humidistat shall be 45%.

Issue: does not specify the type of contact sensors and alarms
Correction: The DigitalHome security system shall use magnetic contact sensors and piezoelectric sound alarms.

Issue: does not specify the type of power switches
Correction: The Appliance Manager shall be able to manage up to one hundred 115 volt, 10 amp smart power switches.

Issue: does not specify the maximum number of devices that can be updated simultaneously
Correction: The system shall be able to update the status of up to 50 devices simultaneously every two seconds.

Issue: does not specify the time required for system recovery
Correction: The system recovery mechanism shall restore system data within 5 minutes of a failure.

Issue: does not specify the encryption algorithm to be used
Correction: The DigitalHome web system shall use AES-256 encryption for securing user data.

Issue: does not specify the format for documentation
Correction: All documentation shall be provided in PDF format and follow the HomeOwner document format [HO2305].

Issue: does not specify the format of the DH Planner documentation
Correction: The DH Planner documentation shall be provided in HTML format accessible through the DigitalHome web interface.

Label: N/A
Issue: does not include a section on user interface design
Correction: The system shall provide a user-friendly interface with intuitive navigation, consistent layout, and responsive design for various devices.
